text: Sixteenth | The home of good influence. The home of good influence. And where beyond begins. View Talent Sixteenth minute and beyond Andy Warhol said, “In the future, everyone will be world-famous for 15 minutes.” Pretty spot on for someone who had no idea about smartphones, social media, “content,” or selfies. But we go even further and ask: What about the Sixteenth minute? And every minute beyond? @scheckeats We’re Sixteenth, one of the leading, global, 360° Creator talent management companies. We bring in the full power and influence of the Whalar Group ecosystem to inspire and nourish Creators while they discover and grow their potential.
